title: MarketAxess (MKTX) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) valuation model for MarketAxess.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 3.5% - Based on the trailing twelve months revenue growth of 3.5%.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.0% - Assumes long-term terminal growth aligned with target inflation and GDP growth.
assumptions.discountRate: 10.0% - Standard weighted average cost of capital (WACC) estimate reflecting the company's risk profile and equity risk premium.
